parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { model: ($env.OPENCLAW_MODEL || 'openai/gpt-5.4'), response_format: { type: 'json_object' }, messages: [ { role: 'system', content: $json.systemInstructions }, { role: 'user', content: JSON.stringify({ task: $json.task, rules: $json.rules, style: $json.style, sectionsRequired: $json.sectionsRequired, property: $json.property }) } ] } }}

meta.notes: Dedicated Ticket 5 draft webhook. Receives draft request JSON, calls model, validates response, returns Ticket 5 JSON.
